privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/kinetics_data.csv. The exported CSV should contain exactly 6 data rows (plus 1 header row) with headers 'Time (min)' and 'Absorbance (AU)'. Key data points to verify if the file contents are visible: Time 10 has Absorbance 0.45, Time 30 has Absorbance 0.80, and Time 60 has Absorbance 0.95.
